description_long: This object is a lifelike representation of a male Mallard duck, characterized by its iridescent green head, yellow bill, and a distinct white ring around its neck. The body features a rich brown chest, lighter brown and gray wings, and a black tail with some white feathering. The legs and webbed feet are orange, and the eyes are dark and alert. The plumage is detailed, with visible feather textures and subtle color gradients, especially on the wings and head. The duck's posture is upright and natural, as if standing or walking on land. The overall proportions and coloration are true to a real Mallard, making it easily recognizable in urban parks or near water bodies.
description: A realistic male Mallard duck with a green head, brown body, and orange webbed feet, standing upright. The detailed feather textures and vibrant colors make it visually striking.
description_view_0: Front view showing the green head, yellow bill, white neck ring, and broad chest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the iridescent head, brown chest, layered wing feathers, and orange feet.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, layered brown wings, and black-and-white tail feathers.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with visible green head, brown body, and detailed wing structure.
